DownloadOptionProperties.description: Download option details for a product

cpuAndFileType.description: Specifies the CPU architecture and file type (e.g., "64 Bit, ISO")

iso2LanguageCode.description: Language code for the download option (e.g., "en")

optionTitle.description: Title or description of the download option

softwareVersion.description: Optional field for L+SA products to specify the version (e.g., "2019", "2022")

GenerateDownloadLinksInput.description: Download option details for generateDownloadLinks POST action

cpuAndFileType.description: Specifies the CPU architecture and file type (e.g., "64 Bit, ISO")

iso2LanguageCode.description: Language code for the download option (e.g., "en")

softwareVersion.description: Optional field for L+SA products to specify the version (e.g., "2019", "2022")

values.name: Active
values.description: Key is active and available for activation.

values.name: Inactive
values.description: Key is not valid for activation (e.g., expired, not provisioned, or disabled).

values.name: Blocked
values.description: Key is blocked due to policy, compliance, or security issues (e.g., fraud or piracy).

values.name: Revoked
values.description: Key is permanently revoked (e.g., due to refund or cancellation).

values.name: Replaced
values.description: Key has been replaced or all activations consumed. No longer usable.

values.name: KMS
values.description: Key Management Service (KMS) Key. Used for activating systems within an organization's network via a KMS host. Commonly used in volume activation scenarios.

values.name: MAK
values.description: Multiple Activation Key (MAK). Activates a specific number of systems. Each activation reduces the remaining activation count.

values.name: Setup
values.description: Setup Key. A non-unique 5x5 key, with no activation count associated.

values.name: Retail
values.description: Retail Key. A unique 5x5 key issued to each customer for every order. Activation behavior may vary depending on the product. Refer to the specific product documentation for details on key usage and activation count.

values.name: None
values.description: None. No activation key is provided.

value.description: The SoftwareBillingSubscription items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

productCode.description: Unique identifier for the product purchased

quantity.description: Quantity of the product being billed under this subscription.

status.description: The status of the software billing subscription.

startDate.description: Date when the subscription benefit should start. Format : 2023-02-01T01:01:01.1075056Z

endDate.description: Date when the subscription benefit should end. Format : 2026-02-01T01:01:01.1075056Z

autoRenew.description: Indicates whether the subscription is configured for automatic renewal upon expiration.

renewal.description: Contains information about renewal of this subscription

parentSoftwareBillingSubscriptionId.description: The ID of the software billing subscription corresponding to the base/initial software subscription purchased. Format : /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountName}/providers/Microsoft.SoftwarePlan/softwareBillingSubscriptions/{softwareBillingSubscriptionName}

associatedSoftwareBillingSubscriptionIds.description: The IDs of the software billing subscriptions corresponding to the True up or Licenses that are added on top of the base/initial software subscription purchase (parent). Returned only if requested in the $expand query parameter. Format : /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountName}/providers/Microsoft.SoftwarePlan/softwareBillingSubscriptions/{softwareBillingSubscriptionName}

billingProfileId.description: The ID of the billing profile to which this subscription is billed. Format : /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountName}/billingProfiles/{billingProfileName}

resourceUri.description: The uri of the software subscription resource corresponding to this software billing subscription. Format : /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.SoftwarePlan/softwareSubscriptions/{softwareSubscriptionName}

softwareSubscriptionType.description: The type of the software subscription resource corresponding to this software billing subscription.

SoftwareBillingSubscriptionStatus.description: The status of the software billing subscription.

values.name: Pending
values.description: The software billing subscription is in a pending state. This represents the initial phase after creation, before activation and the commencement of billing.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Software billing subscription has been canceled.

AmendmentFilterParameter.name: filter
AmendmentFilterParameter.description: OData filter expression to filter amendments. Supported fields (eq only): properties/amendmentType (string, e.g. 'trueUp'), properties/isActive (boolean). Examples: filter=properties/amendmentType eq 'trueUp'; filter=properties/isActive eq true; filter=properties/amendmentType eq 'trueUp' and properties/isActive eq true.

BillingAccountNameParameter.name: billingAccountName
BillingAccountNameParameter.description: The ID that uniquely identifies a billing account.

ExpandSoftwareBillingSubscriptionQueryPa.name: $expand
ExpandSoftwareBillingSubscriptionQueryPa.description: The $expand OData query parameter. This is a comma-separated list of additional properties to include in the response. Possible values include: 'associatedSoftwareBillingSubscriptionIds'.

ExpandSoftwareSubscriptionQueryParameter.name: $expand
ExpandSoftwareSubscriptionQueryParameter.description: The $expand OData query parameter. This is a comma-separated list of additional properties to include in the response. Possible values include: 'licenseSummary', 'associatedSoftwareSubscriptionIds'.

values.name: Active
values.description: Key is active and available for activation.

values.name: Inactive

values.name: Blocked
values.description: Key is blocked due to policy, compliance, or security issues (e.g., fraud or piracy).

values.name: Revoked
values.description: Key is permanently revoked (e.g., due to refund or cancellation).

values.name: Replaced
values.description: Key has been replaced or all activations consumed. No longer usable.

PaginationParameters.skipToken.name: skipToken
PaginationParameters.skipToken.description: Continuation token for retrieving the next page of results. Returned in the response nextLink uri when more items are available.

PaginationParameters.top.name: top
PaginationParameters.top.description: Maximum number of items to return per page
